name: SMARTFINANCIAL INC.
summary: SmartFinancial, Inc. is a Tennessee-chartered bank holding company operating SmartBank, a commercial bank with 42 full-service branches and two loan production offices across East and Middle Tennessee, Alabama, Florida, and Georgia. The Bank offers commercial loans, real estate loans, consumer loans, leases, and deposit services. Its subsidiary Fountain Equipment Finance, LLC provides loans and leases for heavy equipment, semi-trucks, and trailers to small and medium-sized businesses throughout the Southeast.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans for income-producing properties including apartment buildings, office, industrial, and retail shopping centers.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Broad range of commercial lending services to business entities including revolving lines of credit and letters of credit.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: One-to-four family residential mortgage loans, occasionally sold in the secondary market.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Retail lending services to individuals including consumer loans and revolving lines of credit.

products.name: Equipment Finance (Fountain Equipment Finance, LLC)
products.description: Loans and leases for heavy equipment, semi-trucks, and trailers to small and medium-sized businesses in the Southeast.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Deposit products for general public with fee-generating services.
